summary: M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 is CLOSED after PR #187 entered origin/main. The task added lightweight localized player guidance with dismiss/collapse, core path feedback, QA ACCEPT, and passing PR CI gates.

M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 and M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 are READY candidates.

After closure, start M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 as the highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task unless taskctl ready changes after closure merge.
No Human Gate is active. Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.
